name: Microsoft SQL
description: Get, add and update data in Microsoft SQL

fields.label: Query
fields.placeholder: SELECT id, name FROM product WHERE quantity > $1 AND price <= $2
fields.description: The SQL query to execute. You can use n8n expressions and $1, $2, $3, etc to refer to the 'Query Parameters' set in options below.

fields.label: Table
fields.description: Name of the table in which to insert data to

fields.label: Columns
fields.description: Comma-separated list of the properties which should used as columns for the new rows

fields.label: Table
fields.description: Name of the table in which to update data in

fields.label: Update Key
fields.description: Name of the property which decides which rows in the database should be updated. Normally that would be "id".

fields.label: Columns
fields.description: Comma-separated list of the properties which should used as columns for rows to update

fields.label: Table
fields.description: Name of the table in which to delete data

fields.label: Delete Key
fields.description: Name of the property which decides which rows in the database should be deleted. Normally that would be "id".
